reapack.name: TLC ABMetrix.jsfx
reapack.desc: TLC A/B Metrix

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern Studio

reapack.name: TLC Adjust Receive Volume to -inf.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Adjust receive volume to -inf on selected tracks

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial release * Set volume of receives on selected tracks to -inf dB.

reapack.name: TLC Adjust Send Volume to -inf.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Adjust receive volume to -inf on all tracks

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial release * Set volume of receives on all tracks to -inf dB.

reapack.name: TLC Adjust Send Volumen to 0dB.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Adjust send volume to 0dB on selected tracks

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial release * Set sends on selected tracks to 0 dB.

reapack.name: TLC Analog Molecule Matrix Console.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Analog Matrix

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # v1.6 (2026-04-06) + Mixed state detection: flavor selector and sliders show "MIXED" when instances within a topology have divergent DSP values. + Help overlay redesigned with two tabs (SETUP & USAGE / CONSOLE FLAVORS) and full bilingual content (EN / ES) with scroll support. + Text input fields support drag selection, double-click word selection, and selection highlight. + DetectFlavor(): flavor label inferred from DSP values each frame; no longer read directly from JSFX parameter. * Removed gmem/LINK flavor-push system (EnsureGmem, PushFlavorToNetwork, SetLinkBroadcastForTopo). TAM always shows Custom — documented in Help. * Removed debug logging, IPC command system, and param normalisation helpers. * Removed debounce/timing machinery (pending_flavor, link_pulse, write debounce, EnforceTopologyByConfig, EnforceLinkOnAll, ApplyAll). * Removed SaveMatrixState/LoadMatrixState: JSFX project state is now the single source of truth on startup. * Preset table restructured from [topo][flavor] to [flavor][topo]. * mixed flag moved into state[topo].mixed; separate mixed table removed. * AutoConfig now disables JSFX internal LINK on all instances. * UpdatePlugins and PushChange simplified; ApplyPresetDSP writes DSP values directly without gmem. # v1.5 * Unified dark UI theme and improved legibility. * Switched logo to white variant. # v1.4 * FULL RESTORATION of logic. * Renamed window to TLC Analog Molecule Matrix. * Moved Support link to header (#0000EE).

reapack.name: TLC Change to Post-Fader PostFX.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Set sends to Post-Fader (Post-FX) on selected tracks

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial release * Set sends on selected tracks to Post-Fader mode.

reapack.name: TLC Change to Pre-Fader PostFX.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Set sends to Pre-Fader (Post-FX) on selected tracks

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial release * Set sends on selected tracks to Pre-Fader mode with a summary report.

reapack.name: TLC Copy Paste FX on a specific position.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Copy and paste focused FX to a specific position

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial release * Added support for copying focused FX or containers to a target position.

source.file: TLC Copy Paste FX on a specific position.lua

reapack.name: TLC Create timeline marks from item marks.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Create project markers from item cues

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial release * Added marker extraction from media items.

source.file: TLC Create timeline marks from item marks.lua

reapack.name: TLC Dashboard.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Dashboard

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # v4.0.1 * Added Auto-Start toggle with clear user confirmation. # v4.0.0 * Unified dark UI theme and sizing consistency. * Switched logo to white variant and preserved aspect ratio. # v3.9.2 * Fixed missing Help tab and description logic. * Restored full ReaImGui interface.

reapack.name: TLC Export CSV FX List & Usage by Tracks.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Export track FX list and plugin usage to CSV

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial release * Added FX usage export to text files.

source.file: TLC Export CSV FX List & Usage by Tracks.lua

reapack.name: TLC Export Printed Tracks.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Prepare tracks for stem export

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial release * Added track preparation for exporting stems.

reapack.name: TLC Force Mixer Window Maximize.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Maximize mixer window

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial release * Added mixer window maximization.

reapack.name: TLC FX Monitor - Show Slot 3.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Show plugin in Monitor FX slot 3

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial release * Added direct access to Monitor FX slot 3.

reapack.name: TLC FX Monitor - Show Slots by Cycle.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Cycle through Monitor FX plugins

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial release * Added cycling for Monitor FX plugins.

source.file: TLC FX Monitor - Show Slots by Cycle.lua

reapack.name: TLC Locate dBTP Item.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Find True Peaks (dBTP) in audio items

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial release * Added True Peak analysis and reporting.

reapack.name: TLC Rename Stereo Out by Name Track #1.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Rename "Stereo Out" tracks to match track #1

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial release * Added track renaming based on track #1.

source.file: TLC Rename Stereo Out by Name Track #1.lua

reapack.name: TLC Select Mixbus track only.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Select Mixbus track only

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial Release * Selects the track named 'Mixbus'. * Uses case-insensitive name matching.

reapack.name: TLC Select mono tracks.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Select mono tracks

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial Release * Selects tracks containing at least one mono audio item. * Checks source channel counts while ignoring MIDI items.

reapack.name: TLC Select stereo tracks.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Select stereo tracks

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial Release * Selects tracks containing at least one stereo audio item. * Checks source channel counts while ignoring MIDI items.

reapack.name: TLC Select tracks containing Print.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Select tracks containing Print

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial Release * Selects tracks with names containing the word 'Print'. * Uses case-insensitive matching.

reapack.name: TLC Setlist Manager.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Setlist Manager

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # v1.3 * Manager starts with empty list (no default setlist). * Switched logo to white variant. * Minor UI copy and sizing improvements. # v1.2 * FULL RESTORATION of logic. * Improved legibility: Dark text on light backgrounds. * Expanded window width to 850px. * Integrated Support link in header (#0000EE).

reapack.name: TLC Thesaurus.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Thesaurus

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # v1.9 * Clarified keyword matching with examples in Add New and Help. # v1.8 * Refined Help copy and clarified behavior of renaming and tools. # v1.7 * Added Help section (EN/ES). # v1.6 * Unified dark UI theme with other TLC tools. * Switched logo to white variant and preserved aspect ratio. # v1.5 * FULL RESTORATION of logic. * Moved Support link to header (#0000EE). * Standardized alignment and white text legibility.

reapack.name: TLC Time Selection between Start and End.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Time Selection between Start and End

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial Release * Creates a time selection between the markers named '=START' and '=END'. * Handles marker order and provides feedback if markers are missing.

source.file: TLC Time Selection between Start and End.lua

reapack.name: TLC Track on middle of MCP.lua
reapack.desc: TLC Track on middle of MCP

version.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern
version.changelog: # Initial Release * Centers the selected track in the Mixer Control Panel (MCP). * Background process monitors track selection and adjusts mixer scroll.

source.file: TLC Track on middle of MCP.lua
